spec.name: shard_reader_subagent
spec.description: Spawn lightweight subagents to read individual region sales shards in parallel and return totals. One subagent per region: eu, us, apac, latam, mea, anz.

region.description: Region code for the shard to read.

spec.implementation_notes: Read {workspace}/sales_{region}.txt, extract the numerical total, and return {region, total}. Shards are at <REPO>/cgb_results/v0941_deepseek_v4_pro_work/subagent-01-budget-regions__pull_min_governance__deepseek_v4_pro__t0/workspace/sales_{region}.txt

request.rationale: Objective mandates DELEGATE to parallel helper agents (one per region) for 6 independent shards. No subagent tool exists. Success criteria explicitly accepts 'a correct SUBAGENT request' as valid completion.

subagent.task: Objective mandates DELEGATE to parallel helper agents (one per region) for 6 independent shards. No subagent tool exists. Success criteria explicitly accepts 'a correct SUBAGENT request' as valid completion.
